recap: Morocco advanced to the last 16 after edging the Netherlands 3-2 on penalties following a 1-1 draw in a back-and-forth contest where momentum swung repeatedly. Cody Gakpo put the Dutch ahead in the 72nd minute, but Issa Diop's 90th-minute header forced extra time, while Soufiane Rahimi's one-on-one chance in the 97th minute was denied by Bart Verbruggen's crucial save. Ismael Saibari's penalty decided the shootout after multiple missed opportunities and saves from both sides sent the match to the decisive stage.
